range_unified.description: True iff the constraint threshold's normalisation range is identical by construction to the range the node's interventions used or would use; false precisely when resolution diverged (e.g. a producer-declared cap overridden by a measured intervention spread).

decision_grade.description: Absence of this marker means NOT decision-grade (fail-closed). Consumers MUST NOT treat a missing marker as trustworthy.

scale_provenance.description: Absence of this marker means NOT decision-grade (fail-closed). Consumers MUST NOT treat a missing marker as trustworthy.
